titleStmt.title: SII 23.380: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 380. (A.R. No. 380 of 1907.) Māyūram, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Pañchanadēśvara temple—on the same wall Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III: year 25: 1203 A.D.

summary.p: The king is credited with the conquest of Madurai, Īḻam and Karuvūr and with having taken the head of the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya. The details of the date are given as Makara, śu. 14, Monday, Punarvasu, which would correspond to A.D. 1203, January 13, but Nak. Pūrvāshāḍhā. This records an agreement given by the mahāsabhā of the place remitting as ūrkīḻ-īṟaiyili the antarāyam tax on half a vēli of land which is said to have been purchased by the temple from one Kāśyapaṉ Nārasiṅgaṉ Tiruppērambalanambi (of Villiyanallūr in Tiruvindaḷūr-nāḍu ?)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum Ī
ḻamuṅ karuvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭa
śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevar
kku yāṇṭu 2 10 5vatu makara nāyaṟṟu
p pūrvapakṣattu caturtteciyum tiṅka
ḷ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nā
ḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu
tiruvaḻuntūr nāṭṭu kulottuṅkaco
ḻaṉ kuṟṟālattu Uṭaiyār tiruvaiyāṟu
ṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇṭecura tevaṟku U
yār tevatāṉam
ḷanāṭṭu tiruvintaḷū
villiyanallūr
Iṟṟai nāḷāl Iṉṉāya nā
yili ceytu nirvārttukkuṭut
ṟṟavilai nilam I Iṉnilam A�
yanārkku cantirātittavaṟ
kkiḻ Iṟaiyi
kuṭuttom Immakācapaiyom Inni
lam Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭumiṭa
ttu kāyciyapaṉ nāraciṅkaṉ tiruppe
rampalanampi pakkal tirunāmattukkā
ṇiyāka vilaikoṇṭa nilam Araiyum piramā
ṇa yiṟaiyili ceytu Ip
peril yiṟuppuk koṇṭu pacāṉa mutal kaḻit
tukkuṭukka kaṭavomākavum Iṉnilattukku U
ḷarkkiḻ yiṟaiyiliopāti Antarāyaṅ
koḷḷakkaṭavatallāttākavum yippaṭi ca
mmatittu Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyili ceytu ku
ṭuttom Immakāsapaiyom
nilam Araiyum Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyi
li ceytu kuṭuttamaikku . paṇiyālūrka
ṇakku paṟiyalūr kiḻavaṉ Uttamap piriyaṉ Ūrka
ṇakku nālūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku
Ivai kācipaṉ nāraśiṅṅaṉ tirupperampalanam
pi Eḻuttu .-ippaṭikku Ivai kavuṇiyaṉ va
ttāṉ civatevapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭik
ku Ivai [ kāśya] paṉ tirukkaḻa yuṭaiyā
ṉ nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai civakalliyāṇanampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai sarvateva
ṉ tirucciṟṟampalanampi Eḻuttu .-ippaṭikku Ivai kāciyapaṉ
puṟṟatevapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu .-ippaṭikku Ivai nāṇiyaṉ tiruveṇkāṭu pa
ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu .- Ippaṭikku Ivai kavuṇiyaṉ nampaṉ Eḻuttu .
ippaṭikku Ivai koṭaṉ nampaṉ Eḻuttu .-ippaṭikku Ivai
vikkirama coḻapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 23.380 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
